name: create_appointment
description: Book only after the caller explicitly confirms one live option AND lookup_patient has returned the patient UUID. ALWAYS include caller_full_name. NEVER create an anonymous booking. Copy patient_id exactly from lookup_patient patients[0].id. Copy practitioner_id, branch_id, appointment_type_id, and start_time UNCHANGED from ONE slot object in the most recent search_availability result -- start_time is UTC and looks nothing like the spoken local time (start_time_display); never reconstruct, round, retime, or guess it, and never derive it from what you said aloud. If the tool returns patient_identification_required, do NOT retry: call lookup_patient. If it returns availability_search_required, call search_availability again and reconfirm.
execution_message_description: Short confirmation-hold while writing the booking.

patient_id.description: Required. Copy the exact UUID from lookup_patient patients[0].id. NEVER pass a name or phone, and never call this function before lookup_patient has returned one patient.

caller_full_name.description: Exact full name spoken by the caller. Required even if patient_id is known.

practitioner_id.description: Required. Copy unchanged from practitioner_id in the same selected search_availability slot.

practitioner_name.description: Doctor name only when practitioner_id is unavailable.

branch_id.description: Required. Copy unchanged from branch_id in the same selected search_availability slot.

branch_name.description: Branch name only when branch_id is unavailable.

appointment_type_id.description: Required. Copy unchanged from appointment_type_id in the same selected search_availability slot.

appointment_type_name.description: Appointment type name only when appointment_type_id is unavailable.

start_time.description: Required. Copy the complete ISO-8601 UTC timestamp unchanged from start_time in the same selected search_availability slot. This is NOT the same string as start_time_display -- never derive it from the local time you spoke aloud.
